page.content: In the financial report for LafargeHolcim dated Dec-23, key metrics reveal insights into both liquidity and profitability ratios. The P/E Ratio stands at 15.2, with a Current Ratio of 1.75 and a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.45, complemented by a Gross Margin of 32.6%, a Net Profit Margin of 8.4%, a Return on Assets of 5.2%, a Return on Equity of 12.1%, and an Operating Margin of 3.8%.

page.content: For the subsequent row, the P/E Ratio is recorded at 12.3, with a Current Ratio of 1.50 and a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.55, alongside a Gross Margin of 35.0%, a Net Profit Margin of 9.0%, a Return on Assets of 3.8%, a Return on Equity of 7.9%, and an Operating Margin of $250M. In examining the Prefabrication Metrics, the Adoption Rate for Residential construction shows an increase from 30% in 2022 to 60% by 2028, while Commercial adoption rises from 25% to 55% over the same period, and Industrial adoption increases from 20% to 50%.

page.content: The P/E Ratios for the years 2022 through 2028 escalate from 15.2 to 18.5, with the Current Ratios improving from 1.5 to 2.1, and Debt/Equity ratios decreasing from 0.5 to 0.1, indicating a trend of increasing market share from 25% to 35%.
